results.snippet: A jet nozzle will have a larger throat area and a lower chamber total pressure than a rocket nozzle. results.title: Design and analysis of rocket nozzle - ScienceDirect
results.snippet: For a converging-diverging nozzle, exit diameter plays a crucial role in its performance as observed by Arjun et al., [2]. Design and structural analysis for solid rocket motor casing is carried out by Dinesh et al., [3] considering it as a pressure vessel to reduce the complications.

results.title: Design of Rocket Nozzles — Notes for Propulsion
results.snippet: Design of Rocket Nozzles The nozzle is the most important component of the rocket engine. The nozzle converts high pressure, and ideally high temperature, gases into low pressure gases with much higher velocity by changing the cross-sectional area of the flow. results.title: Bell nozzle - Wikipedia
results.snippet: The bell or contour shape is designed to impart a large angle expansion for the gases right after the throat. results.title: Bell nozzle — Grokipedia
results.snippet: A Bell nozzle is a convergent-divergent exhaust nozzle used in rocket engines, characterized by its contoured, bell-shaped divergent section that efficiently expands and accelerates high-temperature, high-pressure combustion gases from subsonic speeds at the throat to supersonic velocities at the ex

results.snippet: This document describes the design and analysis of a bell type rocket nozzle. It discusses the various steps involved in designing the nozzle using G.V. results.title: Design Optimization of a Thrust Nozzle - GDTk
results.snippet: It is easy to include Eilmer flow simulations in an automatic optimization procedure. This note documents an example of determining the optimal shape of a classic, bell-shaped nozzle for a rocket motor.
